    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    HardwareAPI
    HardwareAPI class.
    HardwareConfiguration
     
    NetworkAPI
    NetworkAPI class.
    NetworkConfiguration
     
    OsAPI
    OsAPI class.
    OsAutoConfiguration
    Spring Boot auto-configuration for the OS library.
    OsConfiguration
     
    SshAPI
    Public SSH API — unified facade over client operations (remote command execution, file transfer) and host management (authorized_keys).
    SshAPI.SshCommandResult
    Result of a remotely executed SSH command.
    SshClientAPI
    Service for executing commands and transferring files on a remote SSH host.
    SshClientAPI.SshCommandResult
    Result of a remotely executed SSH command.
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    Infrastructure-layer configuration for establishing an SSH connection.
    SshConfiguration
     
    SshHostAPI
    Service for managing SSH access on a remote host — reading and writing authorized_keys, checking key presence, etc.
